commit_recommendation.message: It is recommended to commit this history directory now: specs/.history/desired-ticket-workflow/closed-snapshot-128-clear-stale-transitive-error

history_policy: append-only by convention; existing entries are not overwritten and filesystem permissions remain git-friendly
summary: Promoted desired/current into program_model: sync success clears persisted TRANSITIVE_RESOLVE_FAILED (issue #128)

assertions: A sync pass after the offending reference is removed clears the persisted TRANSITIVE_RESOLVE_FAILED error (zero remaining refs clears unconditionally).
A reconcile pass (ValidateAndClearError) clears a persisted TRANSITIVE_RESOLVE_FAILED whose declared references are all met, and leaves it when refs remain unmet.
Attribution behavior for genuinely failing refs is unchanged.

tickets.objective: A persisted TRANSITIVE_RESOLVE_FAILED error on installed/<parent>.json must not outlive its cause: after any sync pass in which every reference the parent currently declares resolves (including the pass after the offending reference was removed, leaving zero refs), and after a reconcile pass, the outstanding-errors state no longer contains the error. Restores the ErrorKind doc contract 'Self-clears on the next pass where every ref resolves'.
tickets.title: Stale TRANSITIVE_RESOLVE_FAILED error never clears after the offending reference is removed
